zh.lifeSummary: Alice de Boson是Robert de Boson和Mrs Robert de boson of Devonshire的女兒，於大約1270年出生。她與Hugh de Ferrers結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1295年之後在英國英格蘭戴文爾斯頓 費雷斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Boson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of North German, Danish, and Norwegian   Boysen  .
English: from the Middle English personal name Boie (Old English Boia) + -son.

variants.name: Boysen
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Gerd, Hans, Erwin, Hermann, Juergen, Lorenz, Siegfried.
North German, Danish, and Norwegian: patronymic from the personal name   Boye  .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: Alice de Boson was born about 1270 as the daughter of Robert de Boson and Mrs Robert de boson of Devonshire. She married Hugh de Ferrers. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died after 1295, in Churston Ferrers, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice de Bosonは約1270年にRobert de BosonとMrs Robert de boson of Devonshireの娘として生まれた。Hugh de Ferrersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1295年以後にイギリスイギリスデボンチャーストン フエレルズで死去した。

ko.Plympton St Mary, Devon, England: 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 플림프턴 스트 메리
ko.lifeSummary: Alice de Boson(은)는 대략 1270년 Robert de Boson(와)과 Mrs Robert de boson of Devonshire의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Hugh de Ferrers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1295년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 c후르스턴 페레르스에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Alice de Boson родилась около 1270 г. Её родителей звали Robert de Boson и Mrs Robert de boson of Devonshire. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugh de Ferrers. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла после 1295 г. в местности чурстон фиррирс, девон, Англия, Великобритания.
